evidence_summary: Diff matches the documentation-only plan (8 files: 6 .hs note blocks plus implementation_notes.md and CHANGELOG.md). All authoritative gates pass on main checkout: cabal build/test (1302 examples, 0 failures) and thesis-conformance gate (exit 0). Previous worktree rejection was environment-only (stale dist-newstyle cache caused O15-ELAB-LAMBDA-VAR matcher command failure).
